title: GEAR AID Anti-Fog Spray for All Goggles, Masks and Eyewear, 0.5 fl oz
description:
When you’re snorkeling or diving, a foggy dive mask can be problematic. A quick application of Sea Drops anti-fog and cleaner clears up dirty and foggy lenses – giving you a crystal-clear view underwater. It’s easy to use waterside. Just squeeze, rub, rinse and wear. The gentle formula will not harm surrounding silicone or rubber support frames. So, toss a bottle of Sea Drops Anti-Fog and Cleaner in your dive kit and see what you’ve been missing.

GEAR AID Anti-Fog Spray for All Goggles, Masks and Eyewear, 0.5 fl oz

Whether diving underwater or flying over snow, clear vision is a must. Count on GEAR AID’s Anti-Fog Spray to keep swim or ski goggles fog free. Previously known as Sea Quick, this multipurpose spray-on formula is the fast way to prevent annoying fog on all types of eyewear. One quick spray, then buff or rinse. That’s all it takes for long lasting anti-fog protection. See the whole picture with a clear, properly defogged mask or lens with Anti-Fog Spray by Gear Aid.

Key Features

  • Apply on all types of lenses, optics and eyewear including swim goggles, ski masks, binoculars and sunglasses
  • Spray on for instant fog free vision; fast acting formula works quickly to defog eyewear
  • Get clear vision for hours with just one application of this non-toxic, long lasting formula
  • Treat multiple goggles and masks with only a 0.5 fl oz bottle of this concentrated anti-fog spray
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 40100-376
  • UPC: 707582758380
  • Color: White
  • Size: Small
